name: CRM Setup Guide
description: CRM Setup Guide - Marketing template for growth professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Design Your Pipeline Go to the Pipeline Design tab. Define your sales stages, exit criteria, and expected conversion rates. This is the backbone of your CRM. Step 2: Map Contact Properties Use the Contact Properties tab to define every field your CRM needs — standard and custom. Mark which are required vs optional. Step 3: Plan Automations The Automations tab helps you map trigger-based workflows: lead assignment, email sequences, task creation, and stage changes.
